name: linear-opencode-agent
description: Self-hosted Linear agent powered by OpenCode

scripts.up: docker compose up -d --build && bun run --filter @linear-opencode-agent/plugin build && cp packages/plugin/dist/index.js ~/.config/opencode/plugin/linear.js
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint:check && bun run format:check && bun run knip && bun test
scripts.fix: bun run lint:fix && bun run format:fix
